# Gothic Lock Breaker

> Free browser-based edge-safe lockpicking solver for Gothic 1 Remake players.

## What it does

Gothic Lock Breaker maps chest and door lock plates, their couplings (With / Against), and returns a step-by-step turn sequence that opens the lock without grinding any pin against the wall. Unlike net-turn calculators, it uses edge-safe BFS so your pick won't snap mid-sequence.

## How to use

1. Set lock count, tier, and each plate's starting hole (1 = wall, 4 = notch, 7 = wall).
2. Mark couplings: turn each lock once in-game, then mark With (same way) or Against (opposite) for every plate that moves.
3. Press Break the Lock and follow the numbered walkthrough one turn at a time.

## Pricing

Free. No account. Runs in any modern browser.

## Links

- Live app: https://gothiclockbreaker.com/
- Source: https://github.com/Dsazz/gothic-remake-lockbreaker
- Changelog: https://github.com/Dsazz/gothic-remake-lockbreaker/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
